Bash(python -c "import sys, json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); source_ids=set\(i[''''sourceId''''] for i in data\); print\(''''Total TED items:'''', len\(data\)\); print\(''''Unique sourceIds:'''', source_ids\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''''''''; process.stdin.on\(''''data'''',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\(''''end'''',\(\)=>{const data=JSON.parse\(d\); const ids=new Set\(data.map\(i=>i.sourceId\)\); console.log\(''''Total TED items:'''',data.length\); console.log\(''''Unique sourceIds:'''',[...ids]\);}\)")
